programme.title: Morning Brief
programme.desc: Get ready for the trading day ahead with insight into the latest market-moving news.

programme.title: Opening Bid
programme.desc: Get sharp, actionable insight on today's top headlines from Yahoo Finance executive editor Brian Sozzi.

programme.title: Market Catalysts
programme.desc: A deeper understanding of what's driving the market action to help guide your investment decisions.

programme.title: Market Movers
programme.desc: Yahoo Finance highlights key moments in the previous trading session.

programme.title: Market Domination
programme.desc: The final trading hour brings big moves. Yahoo Finance keeps you updated on all the latest market action.

programme.title: Market Domination: Overtime
programme.desc: The market may have closed, but the action continues. We analyze the day's top takeaways.

programme.desc: Yahoo Finance covers trends driving tomorrow's market, offering insights to help you stay ahead of the curve.

programme.desc: Brian Sozzi decodes market moves and shares scoops to get you thinking differently about your portfolio.
